channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Two Hikers Sustain Injuries in Yellowstone Bear Encounter
item.description: Two hikers were seriously injured in a bear attack in Yellowstone National Park this week, prompting temporary trail closures in the area. The incident occurred on Monday afternoon near the Mystic Fal...

item.title: Kenya Meteorological Department Forecasts Rainfall Across Multiple Regions for the Next Five Days
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has released a five-day weather forecast covering different parts of the country. From Wednesday, May 6, to Sunday, May 10, heavy rainfall is expected in the Highla...

item.title: Comelec Grants Accreditation to MILF-Linked Political Party for Bangsamoro Elections
item.description: The Commission on Elections (Comelec) has officially accredited the United Bangsamoro Justice Party (UBJP), the political party associated with the Moro Islamic Liberation Front (MILF), allowing forme...

item.title: Trump claims military assistance prevented autocorrect errors in social media posts
item.description: During an event for Military Mothers with First Lady Melania Trump, former President Donald Trump revealed that he enlisted the help of the military to stop autocorrect from mistakenly changing his wi...

item.title: Andy Burnham to speak at cross-party progressive event despite Labour concerns
item.description: Andy Burnham, the Mayor of Greater Manchester and potential challenger to Labour leader Keir Starmer, has drawn criticism from some Labour MPs by agreeing to speak at the Change:Now event later this m...

item.title: Researchers Link Time Crystals to Mechanical Systems for Quantum Applications
item.description: Scientists at Aalto University's Department of Applied Physics have successfully connected a time crystal to an external device, marking a significant milestone in quantum physics. Time crystals are a...

item.title: Children as young as 10 arrested amid sectarian disorder in Londonderry
item.description: Police in Londonderry have reported that children as young as 10 have been involved in several nights of disorder in areas including Bishop Street, The Fountain, and Nailors Row. A 13-year-old boy was...

item.title: Calgary Lawyer Faces Multiple Charges Including Child Luring and Sexual Exploitation
item.description: Jordan Bonner, a 46-year-old criminal defence lawyer from Calgary, has been charged with child luring and sexual exploitation offences, following a previous criminal harassment charge against a police...

item.title: Three passengers evacuated from cruise ship after hantavirus cases reported
item.description: Three individuals were evacuated from a cruise ship after cases of hantavirus were reported onboard. The incident took place amid ongoing concerns about the spread of infectious diseases on cruise shi...

item.title: Voters in Tamil Nadu embrace Vijay’s TVK as new political force after decades of Dravidian rule
item.description: Chennai witnessed an air of optimism as C Joseph Vijay’s party, the Tamilaga Vetri Kazhagam (TVK), achieved a remarkable victory in the Tamil Nadu assembly elections, ending the 60-year duopoly of Dra...

item.title: Southern Cross CEO faces early disruption amid broadcaster’s declining valuation
item.description: Rohan Lund’s return to the Seven Network highlights the stark transformation of Australia’s free-to-air television landscape over the past two decades. When Lund first worked at Seven, the broadcaster...

item.title: India allows Pakistani athletes in multilateral events but bars bilateral matches
item.description: The Union Ministry of Youth Affairs and Sports has clarified the policy regarding Pakistani sportspersons participating in India. As per an office memorandum, athletes from Pakistan will be permitted ...

item.title: Makinde’s PDP Faction Insists Primaries and Convention Will Go On Despite Wike’s Threats
item.description: One faction inside the PDP wey dey follow Oyo State Governor, Seyi Makinde, don come out strong against Nyesom Wike, wey be Minister of FCT. According to the faction, Wike’s recent media speech na dis...

item.title: Veteran Biker Basie Gerber Dies in Road Accident in South Africa
item.description: The Kenyan and global biking community are mourning the loss of Basie Gerber, aged 78, who died in a road accident on Monday, May 4, in George, South Africa. Basie, affectionately known as Oom Basie, ...

item.title: Dangote Refinery raises petrol price to ₦1,350 per litre amid subsidy-free economy
item.description: Dangote Petroleum Refinery don increase the ex-depot price of petrol by ₦75, so now e dey about ₦1,350 per litre. For some areas, filling stations dey already dey sell close to ₦1,400 per litre. The m...

item.title: Regine Diego Encourages NU Lady Bulldogs to Stay Positive After Setback
item.description: Regine Diego, a key figure in Philippine volleyball, reached out to the NU Lady Bulldogs following a challenging match in the UAAP Season 88 finals. In her message, Diego reminded the team that despit...

item.title: Toronto and York Region police arrest 18-year-old linked to March synagogue shootings
item.description: Toronto and York Region police have arrested an 18-year-old in connection with two separate synagogue shootings that occurred in March. The first incident happened just before midnight on March 6 near...

item.title: Addressing Systemic Failures Following the Death of Kumanjayi Little Baby in Alice Springs
item.description: The tragic death of Kumanjayi Little Baby in Alice Springs has cast a harsh light on long-standing issues within the town camps, highlighting systemic failures in housing, child protection, and domest...

item.title: Alex Eala Advances to Round 2 at the Italian Open After Hard-Fought Match Against Fręch
item.description: Filipino tennis prodigy Alex Eala showcased her resilience and skill at the 2026 Italian Open by defeating Poland's Magdalena Fręch to secure a spot in the second round of the prestigious tournament. ...

item.title: San Miguel Beermen clinch quarterfinals berth with dominant win over Terrafirma Dyip
item.description: San Miguel Beermen have officially sealed their place in the PBA Commissioner's Cup quarterfinals after a convincing victory against Terrafirma Dyip. The match, held on May 6, 2026, showcased San Migu...
